title: Darkmode for MC
description: This pack puts your entire game in dark mode.
body:
This resource pack by jannik6879 puts your entire game into dark mode. It not only changes the texture of the GUI, i.e. inventory, crafting table, etc., but also the button color in the menu and the font color. Take a look at the screenshots I have uploaded and then have a look at the other packs I have created. Maybe you'll like one of them. 😁

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/619101dcd2fa4334aeb63f5130d4ca6f176245aa.png)
